code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
    let b = match b_opt
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if string.len(cur) > 0
        let parsed = string.parse_int(cur)
        match parsed
        when Some(v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(cur) > 0
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  mut prefix: List<Int> = []
  mut cur_max = 0
  mut j = 0
  let m = nums.len()
  while j < m
    let v = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      cur_max = v
    else
      if v > cur_max
        cur_max = v
      end
    end
    prefix = list.push(prefix, cur_max)
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < m
    let v = match prefix.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
